analyst_briefing: All 10 conflicts Contested (week_count=1), medians null precluding deviation calculation; epistemic uncertainty high. Trajectory changes warranted for Russia-Ukraine (Escalating→Stable: I5 de-escalate signals), Myanmar (Escalating→Stable: no new I2 offensives), DRC (Escalating→Stable: weekly stable despite F4). Largest early-warning deviations: Sudan (I2=5 lead signal, deadliest theatre per daily ACLED), Iran (I1-I4 RED-band absolute, Hormuz I4 outlier despite F3/F4). No habituation risks (no locked baselines). F-flags maintain active; no F4 resolutions or new flags (insufficient verification). No roster inclusions (Ethiopia partial I2 only); no retirements. Cross-flags: GMM Hormuz/coltan HIGH; ERM displacement HIGH (Sudan/Lebanon/Gaza). Deviation-over-level: Week 1 seeding shows Sudan/Iran spikes analytically prior over familiar highs (Ukraine/Gaza).
